mapper.select: SELECT * FROM audit_object_leader WHERE 1=1 AND (leader_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR staff_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')) AND is_active = #{isActive} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_object_leader (leader_id, leader_code, leader_name, staff_id, current_unit_name, current_position, phone, is_active, tenure_start_date, tenure_years, fund_scope, audit_count, latest_audit_date, latest_audit_conclusion) VALUES (#{leaderId}, #{leaderCode}, #{leaderName}, #{staffId}, #{currentUnitName}, #{currentPosition}, #{phone}, #{isActive}, #{tenureStartDate}, #{tenureYears}, #{fundScope}, #{auditCount}, #{latestAuditDate}, #{latestAuditConclusion})
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_object_leader SET leader_name=#{leaderName}, staff_id=#{staffId}, current_unit_name=#{currentUnitName}, current_position=#{currentPosition}, phone=#{phone}, is_active=#{isActive}, tenure_start_date=#{tenureStartDate}, tenure_years=#{tenureYears}, latest_audit_conclusion=#{latestAuditConclusion} WHERE leader_id=#{leaderId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM audit_object_leader WHERE is_active=1 AND tenure_years >= 3 ORDER BY tenure_years DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_object_leader SET fund_scope=#{fundScope} WHERE leader_id=#{leaderId}
UPDATE audit_object_leader SET latest_audit_date=NOW() WHERE leader_id=#{leaderId}
UPDATE audit_object_leader SET audit_count=IFNULL(audit_count,0)+1, latest_audit_date=NOW() WHERE leader_id=#{leaderId}
UPDATE audit_object_leader SET audit_count=#{count} WHERE leader_id=#{leaderId}
